title: Naturius Lite
description: Naturius Lite is a modpack optimized for a seamless and efficient Minecraft experience, ensuring smooth gameplay and performance.
body:
# Naturius Lite – Smooth Gameplay and Perfomance

## What is Naturius Lite?

**Naturius Lite** is a carefully crafted Minecraft modpack designed to **maximize performance** without altering the core gameplay. Naturius Lite focuses solely 
on optimization, ensuring a smoother, **lag-free experience** while maintaining the original Minecraft feel.

Whether you're playing on a **low-end PC** struggling with performance or a **high-end system** looking to push frame rates even further, this modpack ensures that **every frame counts**. It achieves this through a set of powerful performance-enhancing mods that replace inefficient vanilla systems with **more optimized** alternatives.

## Key Features

- **Higher FPS:** Significantly smoother performance and higher frame rates in all scenarios.
- **Faster Load Times:** Enter worlds and switch dimensions quicker.
- **Multiplayer Friendly:** Works seamlessly on vanilla and most modded servers.
- **Minimal Resource Usage:** Runs efficiently even on low-end PCs.
- **Zero Gameplay Changes:** Play the same Minecraft you love, just smoother and more responsive.


<details>
<summary>FPS Test</summary>

![FPS Vanilla vs Naturius Lite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0131f69a2f8727fe7e4eaad5e6aff133963999f1_0.webp)

The FPS test was done on a low-end PC:

- **CPU:** AMD Athlon Silver 3050U (2) @ 2.30 GHz
- **GPU:** AMD Radeon Vega Series / Radeon Vega Mobile Series [Integrated]
- **RAM:** 8GB DDR4
- **OS:** Arch Linux
- **Version of Minecraft:** Fabric 1.21.4
- **Last Test:** 21 February 2025

The test results show a 77% increase in FPS when using Naturius Lite, along with improved stability.

Please note that results may vary depending on hardware specifications and world seed.
</details>



## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

- Q: Can I use this modpack on multiplayer servers?
- A: Yes! Naturius is fully compatible with vanilla servers and most modded servers, because they are client-side optimizations.
- Q: Does it work with OptiFine?
- A: No, but you don’t need OptiFine. Naturius Lite uses Sodium and other modern performance mods that provide better performance than OptiFine and more compatible.
- Q: How often does this modpack get updated?
- A: Naturius Lite stays up to date with the latest versions of Minecraft 
and its optimization mods, ensuring you always have the best performance
possible.
